Examples.Title: Delete an access group project
Examples.Description: Allows deletion of an access group project
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using Vercel;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Reads an access group
Examples.Description: Allows to read an access group
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using Vercel;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Reads an access group project
Examples.Description: Allows reading an access group project
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using Vercel;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Update an access group project
Examples.Description: Allows update of an access group project
Examples.Code:
### Update an access group project
# @name updateAccessGroupProject
PATCH {{host}}/v1/access-groups/{{accessGroupIdOrName}}/projects/{{projectId}}?teamId={{teamId}}&slug={{slug}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "role": "ADMIN"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: One of the provided values in the request body is invalid.
One of the provided values in the request query is invalid.
# 401
# Description: The request is not authorized.
# 403
# Description: You do not have permission to access this resource.
